name: 5.5" Wick Trimmer Snuffer and Wick Pusher Candle Holder Set - Threshold™: Elegant Stainless Steel Tools for Candle Care
description:
Enhance your candle experience with the 5.5" Wick Trimmer Snuffer and Wick Pusher Candle Holder Set - Threshold™. Crafted with precision in mind, the wick trimmer guarantees a clean cut, for an even and soot-free burn. The snuffer elegantly extinguishes candles without a hint of smoke, maintaining a serene ambiance. The wick pusher candle holder ensures easy wick care. Packaged in a stylish box, it makes for a perfect gift for any candle lover.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
